mapper.sql: ID AS id, PARTNER_ID AS partnerId, VENDOR_NM AS vendorNm, LOCATION AS location, PHONE_NO AS phoneNo, PHONE_NO2 AS phoneNo2, KAKAO_ID AS kakaoId, ETC_INFO AS etcInfo, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPD_USER AS updUser, UPD_TM AS updTm, DEL_YN AS delYn
mapper.update:
/* com.shop.mapper.PartnerVendor.updatePartnerVendorExistOnly */ UPDATE TB_PARTNER_VENDOR
VENDOR_NM = #{vendorNm},
LOCATION = #{location},
PHONE_NO = #{phoneNo},
PHONE_NO2 = #{phoneNo2},
KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId},
ETC_INFO = #{etcInfo},
UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW()
WHERE ID = #{id}
/* com.shop.mapper.PartnerVendor.deletePartnerVendor */ UPDATE TB_PARTNER_VENDOR SET DEL_YN = 'Y', UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
